prompt: A detail view for my checking account: the current balance, account number, and its recent transactions with each one's status.
wire:
export default function CheckingDetail() { const [account, setAccount] = useState(null); const [transactions, setTransactions] = useState([]); const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true); useEffect(() => { tools.host_listAccounts({}).then((res) => { const accounts = res.data ?? res ?? []; const checking = accounts.find((a) => (a.type ?? a.accountType ?? a.name ?? "").toLowerCase().includes("check") ) ?? accounts[0]; if (!checking) { setLoading(false); return; } setAccount(checking); return tools.host_listAccountTransactions({ id: checking.id }); }).then((res) => { if (res) { const txns = res.data ?? res ?? []; setTransactions(txns); } setLoading(false); }).catch(() => setLoading(false)); }, []); if (loading) { return (
Loading…
); } if (!account) { return (
No checking account found.
); } const balanceCents = account.balanceCents ?? account.balance ?? 0; const accountNumber = account.accountNumber ?? account.number ?? account.mask ? `••••${account.mask ?? ""}` : account.id; const statusTone = (s) => { if (!s) return "neutral"; const v = s.toLowerCase(); if (v === "completed" || v === "settled" || v === "posted") return "success"; if (v === "pending") return "neutral"; if (v === "failed" || v === "declined") return "danger"; return "neutral"; }; return (
{/* Hero balance */}
{account.name ?? "Checking account"}
{fmt.money(balanceCents)}
Account {accountNumber}
{/* Transactions */}
Recent transactions
{transactions.length === 0 ? (
No transactions yet.
) : (
{transactions.map((txn, i) => { const amountCents = txn.amountCents ?? txn.amount ?? 0; const isDebit = amountCents < 0; const status = txn.status ?? txn.state ?? ""; const tone = statusTone(status); const toneColor = tone === "success" ? "#067647" : tone === "danger" ? "var(--vendo-color-danger)" : "var(--vendo-color-muted)"; return (
{txn.description ?? txn.merchant ?? txn.name ?? "Transaction"}
{txn.date ? fmt.dateTime(txn.date) : txn.createdAt ? fmt.dateTime(txn.createdAt) : ""}
{status ? ( {status} ) : null}
{isDebit ? "−" : "+"}{fmt.money(Math.abs(amountCents))}
); })}
)}
); }
